title: athyrium brevistipes
intro: Athyrium brevistipes, also known as the Short-scaled Lady Fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Athyriaceae. This plant is believed to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits associated with Athyrium brevistipes include its potential to reduce inflammation, lower blood pressure, and act as an antiseptic. In herbal preparations, Athyrium brevistipes is often used in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is typically dried and made into teas or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
